title: Skills Marketplace
subtitle: Discover, create, and run reusable skills that agents can use
noSkillsDesc: Create your first skill or ask Luna to build one for you.

validation.pythonSignature: Python skills must define an `execute(inputs)` function.
validation.markdownMissingInputs: Template references undeclared inputs: {{vars}}. Add them in the Skill Inputs section.

mcp.intro: Let external coding clients — Claude Code, Gemini CLI, VS Code Copilot — discover and call this tenant's skills over the MCP protocol. This is for consuming skills from outside AgentProvision, not for adding an agent to your fleet (use Agent Fleet → Import Agent for that).
mcp.toolsAvailable: {{count}} skill(s) available as MCP tools for your tenant.
mcp.tokenMissing: You're not logged in, so the configs below use a placeholder for Authorization. Log in first, then reopen this modal — your real token will be filled in automatically.
mcp.authNote: Requests authenticate via the standard Authorization: Bearer header. The X-Tenant-Id header is optional and only used for cross-tenant support calls — your JWT already scopes the tenant.

form.name: Skill Name
form.autoTriggerPlaceholder: When should Luna use this skill automatically?
form.chainToPlaceholder: Select skills to run after this one

errors.load: Failed to load skills. Please try again.
